Title: Authenticate a user
Test Steps:
1. Send authentication request with valid credentials.
2. Verify the response indicates successful authentication.
Expected Result: Successful authentication response received.

Title: Attempt to authenticate with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Send authentication request with invalid credentials.
2. Verify the response indicates failed authentication.
Expected Result: Failed authentication response received.

Title: Notify system sends data to data manager
Test Steps:
1. Authentication system triggers NotifySystem.
2. NotifySystem sends data to DataManager.
3. Verify DataManager receives the data.
Expected Result: Data successfully transferred to DataManager.

Title: Retrieve user profile data
Test Steps:
1. UserProfile retrieves data from DataManager.
2. Verify UserProfile contains expected user details.
Expected Result: UserProfile contains correct user details.

Title: Update user profile data
Test Steps:
1. UserProfile updates user email.
2. Verify updated email is reflected in DataManager.
Expected Result: Updated email is stored correctly in DataManager.

Title: Generate a report
Test Steps:
1. ReportHandler generates a report based on user data.
2. Verify report contains expected data.
Expected Result: Report contains accurate user consumption data.

Title: Retrieve user data from database
Test Steps:
1. DataManager queries the database for user data.
2. Verify user data is retrieved correctly.
Expected Result: Correct user data is retrieved from the database.

Title: Store user data in database
Test Data:
- Authenticated user ID: 123
- New consumption data
Test Steps:
1. DataManager stores new consumption data in the database.
2. Verify stored data matches the input.
Expected Result: New consumption data is stored correctly in the database.

Title: Web server retrieves report from database
Test Steps:
1. WebServer requests report from Database.
2. Verify report is retrieved correctly.
Expected Result: Report is retrieved successfully from the database.

Title: Web server sends report to user
Test Steps:
1. WebServer sends report to ReportHandler.
2. Verify ReportHandler receives the report.
Expected Result: Report is sent successfully to ReportHandler.

Title: Generate report comment
Test Steps:
1. Report generates a comment based on consumption data.
2. Verify comment is generated correctly.
Expected Result: Comment accurately reflects user consumption patterns.

Title: Retrieve user consumption data
Test Steps:
1. Utenti retrieves consumption data from DataManager.
2. Verify consumption data is retrieved correctly.
Expected Result: Consumption data is retrieved successfully.

Title: Add new consumption data
Test Data:
- Authenticated user ID: 123
- New consumption record
Test Steps:
1. Utenti adds new consumption data to DataManager.
2. Verify new consumption data is stored correctly.
Expected Result: New consumption data is stored successfully.

Title: Track achievement status
Test Steps:
1. Obbiettivi sets achievement status for user.
2. Verify achievement status is updated correctly.
Expected Result: Achievement status is updated successfully.

Title: Increment green points
Test Data:
- Authenticated user ID: 123
- Points to increment: 10
Test Steps:
1. Gioco increments green points for user.
2. Verify green points are incremented correctly.
Expected Result: Green points are incremented successfully.

Title: Create a new user
Test Steps:
1. Main retrieves user data from Local User.
2. Main validates user data.
3. If data is valid, Main adds user to Data Manager.
4. Verify user is added successfully.
Expected Result: User creation is successful.

Title: Re-enter invalid user data
Test Steps:
1. Main retrieves user data from Local User.
2. Main validates user data.
3. If data is invalid, Main prompts Local User to re-enter data.
4. Repeat until valid data is entered.
5. Verify user is added successfully after valid data entry.
Expected Result: User creation is successful after valid data entry.

Title: View user profile
Test Steps:
1. Main checks if user is authenticated.
2. If authenticated, Main requests user data from Data Manager.
3. Verify user data is retrieved successfully.
Expected Result: User profile data is retrieved successfully.

Title: Attempt to view profile without authentication
Test Steps:
1. Main checks if user is authenticated.
2. If not authenticated, Main prompts user to authenticate first.
3. Verify user is redirected to authentication.
Expected Result: User is prompted to authenticate before viewing profile.

Title: Modify user data
Test Data:
- Authenticated user ID: 123
- Modified user details: "Jane Doe", "janedoe@example.com", "newpassword"
Test Steps:
1. Main checks if user is authenticated.
2. If authenticated, Main requests data modification from Local User.
3. Local User modifies data and sends request to Data Manager.
4. Data Manager updates data.
5. Verify data is updated successfully.
Expected Result: User data is updated successfully.

Title: Attempt to modify data without authentication
Test Data:
- Unauthenticated user ID: 123
- Modified user details: "Jane Doe", "janedoe@example.com", "newpassword"
Test Steps:
1. Main checks if user is authenticated.
2. If not authenticated, Main prompts user to authenticate first.
3. Verify user is redirected to authentication.
Expected Result: User is prompted to authenticate before modifying data.

Title: Enter new consumption data
Test Data:
- Authenticated user ID: 123
- New consumption record
Test Steps:
1. Main requests consumption data from Local User.
2. Local User adds consumption data to Data Manager.
3. Data Manager confirms successful addition.
4. Verify consumption data is added successfully.
Expected Result: New consumption data is added successfully.

Title: Attempt to enter invalid consumption data
Test Data:
- Authenticated user ID: 123
- Invalid consumption record
Test Steps:
1. Main requests consumption data from Local User.
2. Local User attempts to add invalid consumption data to Data Manager.
3. Data Manager rejects invalid data.
4. Verify invalid data is not added.
Expected Result: Invalid consumption data is rejected.

Title: Request user consumption data
Preconditions: User has at least one consumption
Test Steps:
1. Main checks user consumption.
2. If user has consumption, Main requests data from Data Manager.
3. Data Manager retrieves data and sends it back to Local User.
4. Verify data is retrieved successfully.
Expected Result: User consumption data is retrieved successfully.

Title: Attempt to request data without consumption
Test Steps:
1. Main checks user consumption.
2. If user has no consumption, Main does not request data.
3. Verify no data request is made.
Expected Result: No data request is made due to lack of consumption.

Title: Update user report with new data
Preconditions: User has at least one consumption
Test Data:
- Authenticated user ID: 123
- New consumption record
Test Steps:
1. Main requests user consumption data from Local User.
2. Local User requests new data from Data Manager.
3. Data Manager retrieves new data and sends it back to Local User.
4. Local User updates report with new data.
5. Main confirms successful report update.
Expected Result: Report is updated successfully with new data.

Title: Delete user report
Preconditions: User has at least one consumption
Test Steps:
1. Main checks user consumption.
2. If user has consumption, Main requests data for report deletion.
3. Data Manager deletes report.
4. Verify report is deleted successfully.
Expected Result: Report is deleted successfully.

Title: Attempt to delete report without consumption
Test Steps:
1. Main checks user consumption.
2. If user has no consumption, Main does not request report deletion.
3. Verify no report deletion occurs.
Expected Result:
No report deletion occurs due to lack of consumption.
